title: Dijon Reviver Salad
description: This herbal and crispy low-calorie-friendly Dijon Reviver Salad is designed to revitalize your system post-hangover with its blend of herbs and a tangy dijon mustard dressing.
instructions: Rinse the lettuce leaves and pat them dry. Break into bite-sized pieces.
Toast croutons until golden brown, then crush them finely with your hands or in a food processor.
In a mixing bowl, combine chopped herbs, minced garlic, balsamic vinegar, and dijon mustard. Stir well to blend the ingredients evenly.
Gently fold in the crushed croutons and reserved dressing into the lettuce leaves. Season with salt and pepper if desired.
Toss gently to distribute the dressing and ensure all ingredients are fully coated.
Serve immediately for best texture and flavor.
